## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. What was broken or missing, what does this fix or add? -->

## Type

- [ ] Config change (Frigate, HA, Insights add-on)
- [ ] Automation / script
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / scripts

## Tested?

- [ ] `sync-config.sh --dry-run` completed without errors
- [ ] Config synced to HAOS host and verified
- [ ] Affected automations tested manually
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included

## Checklist

- [ ] Entity IDs follow naming conventions
- [ ] No `secrets.yaml` values hardcoded (use `!secret`)
- [ ] `docs/roadmap.md` updated if a phase milestone is complete
- [ ] `docs/backlog.md` updated if items are done or changed
